message:
feat: add session detail view with request/response pairs

Implement handleSession to display conversation turns with request/response
pairs. Adds LogEntry, EntryMeta, and ConversationTurn types for parsing
session files. The view shows raw JSON bodies with collapsible raw JSON.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
